8 Ball.effect: 1 in 4 chance for each played 8 to create a Tarot card when scored

Acrobat.effect: X3 Mult on final hand of round

Ancient Joker.effect: Each played card with specific suit gives X1.5 Mult, suit changes at end of round

Arrowhead.effect: Played Spade cards give +50 Chips when scored

Astronomer.effect: All Planet cards and Celestial Packs in the shop are free

Baron.effect: Each King held in hand gives X1.5 Mult

Baseball Card.effect: Uncommon Jokers each give X1.5 Mult

Blackboard.effect: X3 Mult if all cards held in hand are Spades or Clubs

Bloodstone.effect: 1 in 2 chance for played Heart cards to give X1.5 Mult when scored

Blue Joker.effect: +2 Chips for each remaining card in deck

Blueprint.effect: Copies ability of Joker to the right
Blueprint.notes: 复制右侧小丑；Oops 与 Blueprint/Brainstorm 不兼容。

Brainstorm.effect: Copies the ability of leftmost Joker
Brainstorm.notes: 复制最左小丑；Oops 与 Blueprint/Brainstorm 不兼容。

Burglar.effect: When Blind is selected, gain +3 Hands and lose all discards

Burnt Joker.effect: Upgrade the level of the first discarded poker hand each round

Business Card.effect: Played face cards have a 1 in 2 chance to give $2 when scored

Canio.effect: Gains X1 Mult when a face card is destroyed

Campfire.effect: Gains X0.25 Mult for each card sold, resets when Boss Blind is defeated

Card Sharp.effect: X3 Mult if played poker hand has already been played this round

Cartomancer.effect: Create a Tarot card when Blind is selected

Castle.effect: Gains +3 Chips per discarded card of specific suit, changes every round

Cavendish.effect: X3 Mult, 1 in 1000 chance this card is destroyed at end of round

Ceremonial Dagger.effect: When Blind is selected, destroy Joker to the right and add double its sell value to Mult

Certificate.effect: When round begins, add a random playing card with a random seal to hand

Chicot.effect: Disables effect of every Boss Blind

Clever Joker.effect: +80 Chips if played hand contains a Two Pair

Cloud 9.effect: Earn $1 for each 9 in your full deck at end of round

Constellation.effect: Gains X0.1 Mult every time a Planet card is used

Crafty Joker.effect: +80 Chips if played hand contains a Flush

Crazy Joker.effect: +12 Mult if played hand contains a Straight

Delayed Gratification.effect: Earn $2 per discard if no discards are used by end of the round

Devious Joker.effect: +100 Chips if played hand contains a Straight

Diet Cola.effect: Sell this card to create a free Double Tag

DNA.effect: If first hand of round has only 1 card, add a permanent copy to deck

Driver's License.effect: X3 Mult if you have at least 16 Enhanced cards in your full deck

Droll Joker.effect: +10 Mult if played hand contains a Flush

The Duo.effect: X2 Mult if played hand contains a Pair

Dusk.effect: 本盲注最后一手：所有打出的牌额外重触发 2 次（牌的 chips/增强/版本，非整手 joker mult 再乘）。
Dusk.notes: 不是整手分数×3；Needle 仅 1 hand 时该手即为最后一手。

Egg.effect: Gains $3 of sell value at end of round

Erosion.effect: +4 Mult for each card below deck's starting size

Even Steven.effect: Played cards with even rank give +4 Mult when scored

Faceless Joker.effect: Earn $5 if 3 or more face cards are discarded at the same time

The Family.effect: X4 Mult if played hand contains a Four of a Kind

Fibonacci.effect: Each played Ace, 2, 3, 5, or 8 gives +8 Mult when scored

Flash Card.effect: Gains +2 Mult per reroll in the shop

Flower Pot.effect: X3 Mult if poker hand contains a Diamond, Club, Heart, and Spade card

Fortune Teller.effect: +1 Mult per Tarot card used this run

Four Fingers.effect: All Flushes and Straights can be made with 4 cards

Gift Card.effect: Add $1 of sell value to every Joker and Consumable at end of round

Glass Joker.effect: Gains X0.75 Mult for every Glass Card that is destroyed

Gluttonous Joker.effect: Played Club cards give +3 Mult when scored

Greedy Joker.effect: Played Diamond cards give +3 Mult when scored

Green Joker.effect: +1 Mult per hand played, -1 Mult per discard

Gros Michel.effect: +15 Mult, 1 in 6 chance this is destroyed at end of round

Half Joker.effect: +20 Mult if played hand contains 3 or fewer cards

Hallucination.effect: 1 in 2 chance to create a Tarot card when any Booster Pack is opened

Hanging Chad.effect: Retrigger first played card used in scoring 2 additional times

Hiker.effect: Every played card permanently gains +5 Chips when scored

Hit the Road.effect: Gains X0.5 Mult for every Jack discarded this round

Hologram.effect: Gains X0.25 Mult every time a playing card is added to your deck

Ice Cream.effect: +100 Chips, -5 Chips for every hand played

The Idol.effect: Each played card of specific rank and suit gives X2 Mult, changes every round

Invisible Joker.effect: After 2 rounds, sell this card to Duplicate a random Joker

Jolly Joker.effect: +8 Mult if played hand contains a Pair

Luchador.effect: Sell this card to disable the current Boss Blind

Lucky Cat.effect: Gains X0.25 Mult every time a Lucky card successfully triggers

Lusty Joker.effect: Played Heart cards give +3 Mult when scored

Mad Joker.effect: +10 Mult if played hand contains a Two Pair

Madness.effect: When Small/Big Blind is selected, gain X0.5 Mult and destroy a random Joker

Mail-In Rebate.effect: Earn $5 for each discarded card of a specific rank, changes every round

Marble Joker.effect: Adds one Stone card to the deck when Blind is selected

Matador.effect: Earn $8 if played hand triggers the Boss Blind ability

Midas Mask.effect: All played face cards become Gold cards when scored

Mime.effect: Retrigger all cards held in hand abilities

Misprint.effect: 每手随机 +0~+23 flat Mult（均匀分布，期望约 +11.5）。
Misprint.notes: 不是固定 mult；低 roll 会翻车。

Mr. Bones.effect: Prevents Death if chips scored are at least 25% of required, self destructs

Obelisk.effect: Gains X0.2 Mult per consecutive hand without playing most played hand

Odd Todd.effect: Played cards with odd rank give +31 Chips when scored

Onyx Agate.effect: Played Club cards give +7 Mult when scored

Oops! All 6s.effect: 所有绿色字样的「X in Y」概率翻倍（例 1/3→2/3，1/5→2/5）。含负面：玻璃碎、Gros Michel 灭绝、Wheel 暗牌、Wheel of Fortune 等。
Oops! All 6s.notes: 不是把牌变成 6 点；名字是梗。

The Order.effect: X3 Mult if played hand contains a Straight

Pareidolia.effect: All cards are considered face cards

Perkeo.effect: Creates a Negative copy of 1 random consumable at the end of the shop

Photograph.effect: First played face card gives X2 Mult when scored

Raised Fist.effect: Adds double the rank of lowest ranked card held in hand to Mult

Ramen.effect: X2 Mult, loses X0.01 Mult per card discarded

Red Card.effect: Gains +3 Mult when any Booster Pack is skipped

Reserved Parking.effect: Each face card held in hand has a 1 in 2 chance to give $1

Ride the Bus.effect: Gains +1 Mult per consecutive hand played without a scoring face card

Riff-Raff.effect: When Blind is selected, create 2 Common Jokers

Showman.effect: Joker, Tarot, Planet, and Spectral cards may appear multiple times

Rocket.effect: Earn $1 at end of round, payout increases by $2 when Boss Blind is defeated

Rough Gem.effect: Played Diamond cards earn $1 when scored

Runner.effect: Gains +15 Chips if played hand contains a Straight

Satellite.effect: Earn $1 at end of round per unique Planet card used this run

Scary Face.effect: Played face cards give +30 Chips when scored

Scholar.effect: Played Aces give +20 Chips and +4 Mult when scored

Séance.effect: If poker hand is a Straight Flush, create a random Spectral card

Seeing Double.effect: X2 Mult if played hand has a scoring Club and a card of any other suit

Seltzer.effect: Retrigger all cards played for the next 10 hands

Shoot the Moon.effect: Each Queen held in hand gives +13 Mult

Shortcut.effect: Allows Straights to be made with gaps of 1 rank

Sixth Sense.effect: If first hand of round is a single 6, destroy it and create a Spectral card

Sly Joker.effect: +50 Chips if played hand contains a Pair

Smeared Joker.effect: Hearts/Diamonds count as same suit, Spades/Clubs count as same suit

Smiley Face.effect: Played face cards give +5 Mult when scored

Space Joker.effect: 1 in 4 chance to upgrade level of played poker hand

Splash.effect: Every played card counts in scoring

Square Joker.effect: Gains +4 Chips if played hand has exactly 4 cards

Steel Joker.effect: Gives X0.2 Mult for each Steel Card in your full deck

Joker Stencil.effect: 每个空小丑槽 X1 Mult，含自身（5 槽仅 Stencil = X5；2 张占槽 + Stencil + 3 空 = Stencil 侧 X4）。多张 Stencil 相乘极猛。
Joker Stencil.notes: 不是 +1 flat mult；是 XMult 乘区。

Stone Joker.effect: Gives +25 Chips for each Stone Card in your full deck

Supernova.effect: Adds the number of times poker hand has been played this run to Mult

Superposition.effect: Create a Tarot card if poker hand contains an Ace and a Straight

Swashbuckler.effect: Adds the sell value of all other owned Jokers to Mult

Throwback.effect: X0.25 Mult for each Blind skipped this run

Golden Ticket.effect: Played Gold cards earn $4 when scored

To the Moon.effect: Earn an extra $1 of interest for every $5 at end of round

To Do List.effect: 每回合随机指定一种牌型；打出该牌型计分时 +$4；回合结束换目标。必须是该牌型本身，不能子集（葫芦不算两对）。
To Do List.notes: 不是 +mult；是经济小丑。多份独立随机目标。

Trading Card.effect: If first discard of round has only 1 card, destroy it and earn $3

The Tribe.effect: X2 Mult if played hand contains a Flush

Triboulet.effect: Played Kings and Queens each give X2 Mult when scored

The Trio.effect: X3 Mult if played hand contains a Three of a Kind

Spare Trousers.effect: Gains +2 Mult if played hand contains a Two Pair

Turtle Bean.effect: +5 hand size, reduces by 1 each round

Vagabond.effect: Create a Tarot card if hand is played with $4 or less

Vampire.effect: Gains X0.1 Mult per scoring Enhanced card played, removes Enhancement

Walkie Talkie.effect: Each played 10 or 4 gives +10 Chips and +4 Mult when scored

Wee Joker.effect: 起始 +0 Chips；每次计分牌里的 2 被计分时，永久 +8 Chips。重触发（Hack、Dusk、Red Seal 等）每次计分再 +8。
Wee Joker.notes: 不是「每张小丑 +筹码」；必须打出并计分的 2 才成长。

Wily Joker.effect: +100 Chips if played hand contains a Three of a Kind

Wrathful Joker.effect: Played Spade cards give +3 Mult when scored

Yorick.effect: Gains X1 Mult every 23 cards discarded

Zany Joker.effect: +12 Mult if played hand contains a Three of a Kind
